parameters.query: =SELECT id FROM ingestion_log WHERE message_id = '{{ $json.id }}' OR (subject IS NOT NULL AND subject != '' AND LOWER(subject) = '{{ $json.norm_subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND sender_email LIKE '%{{ $json.sender_domain_dedup }}%') LIMIT 1
=SELECT deal_id, company_name FROM deals WHERE ('{{ $json.sender_domain }}' = ANY(sender_domains) OR LOWER(company_name) LIKE LOWER('%{{ $json.guessed_deal_company }}%')) AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1

=INSERT INTO attribution_queue (message_id, sender_email, sender_domain, subject, email_date, ai_guess_company, ai_confidence, doc_type) VALUES ('{{ $json.message_id }}', '{{ $json.sender_email }}', '{{ $json.sender_domain }}', '{{ $json.subject }}', '{{ $json.email_date }}', '{{ $json.guessed_deal_company }}', {{ $json.confidence_score }}, '{{ $json.doc_type }}') ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING

=INSERT INTO ingestion_log (message_id, deal_id, attribution_confidence, attribution_status, sender_email, sender_domain, subject, doc_type, attachment_count, chunk_count, qdrant_namespace) VALUES ('{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.message_id }}', '{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.deal_id }}', '{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.attribution_confidence }}', 'processed', '{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.sender_email }}', '{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.sender_domain }}', '{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.subject }}', '{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.doc_type }}', 0, {{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.chunk_count }}, '{{ $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.qdrant_namespace }}') ON CONFLICT (message_id) DO NOTHING

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ deal_id: $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.deal_id, trigger_message_id: $('Code: Count Chunks').first().json.message_id, trigger_type: 'new_ingestion' }) }}

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO deals (deal_id, company_name, sender_domains, deal_stage, deal_owner, is_active) VALUES ('{{ $json.deal_id }}', '{{ $json.company_name }}', ARRAY['{{ $json.sender_domain }}'], 'discover', 'austin.holland@clearwatersecurity.com', true) ON CONFLICT (deal_id) DO NOTHING

parameters.url: ={{ (function() { const msgId = $('Gmail: Get Full Message').first().json.id; function findIcsAttachmentId(parts) { if (!parts) return null; for (const p of parts) { const mime = (p.mimeType || '').toLowerCase(); const fname = (p.filename || '').toLowerCase(); if (mime === 'text/calendar' || fname.endsWith('.ics')) { return p.body && p.body.attachmentId ? p.body.attachmentId : null; } if (p.parts) { const found = findIcsAttachmentId(p.parts); if (found) return found; } } return null; } const attachId = findIcsAttachmentId($('Gmail: Get Full Message').first().json.payload?.parts || []); return 'https://gmail.googleapis.com/gmail/v1/users/me/messages/' + msgId + '/attachments/' + (attachId || 'none'); })() }}

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO deals (deal_id, company_name, sender_domains, deal_stage, deal_owner, is_active) VALUES ('{{ $json.deal_id }}', '{{ $json.company_name }}', ARRAY['{{ $json.sender_domain }}'], 'discover', 'austin.holland@clearwatersecurity.com', true) ON CONFLICT (deal_id) DO UPDATE SET company_name = CASE WHEN deals.company_name = 'Unknown' THEN EXCLUDED.company_name ELSE deals.company_name END, sender_domains = CASE WHEN deals.company_name = 'Unknown' THEN EXCLUDED.sender_domains ELSE deals.sender_domains END
